tluaIndexKeyInferable.tlua(35,7): error TLUA2322: Type '(a: number) => void' is not assignable to type 'Table<string, number>'.
  Index signature for type 'string' is missing in type '(a: number) => void'.
tluaIndexKeyInferable.tlua(40,7): error TLUA2322: Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'Table<string, number>'.


==== tluaIndexKeyInferable.tlua (2 errors) ====
    // In Lua a record and an interface are both just tables, and iterating one with `pairs`
    // is idiomatic. TypeScript lets only object and type literals stand in for an index
    // signature they do not declare; tlua accepts every object type, or every
    // `Table<K, V>` signature in the standard library would reject named types forever.
    
    interface Point { x: number; y: number }
    
    type Named = { first: string; last: string };
    
    declare p: Point;
    declare nm: Named;
    
    for k, v in pairs(p) do
      local key: string = k;
      local value: number = v;
    end
    
    for k, v in pairs(nm) do
      local key: string = k;
      local value: string = v;
    end
    
    // A literal, which TypeScript already allowed.
    local lit = { a = 1, b = 2 };
    for k, v in pairs(lit) do
      local key: string = k;
      local value: number = v;
    end
    
    local n: number | nil = rawget(p, "x");
    local t: Table<string, number> = p;
    
    // A function is not a table: it has no keys to iterate.
    declare fn: (a: number) => void;
    local bad: Table<string, number> = fn;
          ~~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type '(a: number) => void' is not assignable to type 'Table<string, number>'.
!!! error TLUA2322:   Index signature for type 'string' is missing in type '(a: number) => void'.
    
    // A primitive is not a table either. Its apparent type is an interface -- `Number` --
    // whose members carry no table key at all, so nothing would be left to reject.
    declare num: number;
    local alsoBad: Table<string, number> = num;
          ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'Table<string, number>'.
